description: The signature tool. Semantically matches unstructured event text (title + summary of a disruption) to supplier capability profiles using ELSER on the suppliers' profile_semantic field, ranked by relevance. Returns the suppliers most likely affected by the event, with a normalized score (>=0.5 = confident). Used by the Tracer to find directly-hit suppliers before graph traversal. Inputs: event_text (the event title and summary), size (max suppliers).

configuration.query:
FROM suppliers METADATA _score
| WHERE profile_semantic:?event_text
| EVAL semantic_score = _score, score = _score / (_score + 12.0), lat = ST_Y(location), lon = ST_X(location)
| KEEP supplier_id, name, tier, lat, lon, country, region, components, alternate_for, certifications, lead_time_days, expedited_lead_time_days, capacity, profile_semantic, semantic_score, score
| SORT score DESC
| LIMIT ?size

event_text.description: The event title and summary text, e.g. 'Severe flooding in Vadodara Gujarat inundates chemical plants producing food-grade emulsifier'.

size.description: Maximum number of suppliers to return (e.g. 10).
